examples: I guess I don't need to ask, for no Alpine rose can look more blooming.
Above the tree line there is a zone that is generally called alpine tundra.
The most striking characteristic of the plants of the alpine zone is their low growth form.
But who needs a flush toilet when you have wild open yak pastures and alpine meadows?
Golzernsee itself is a small alpine lake in a glacial trough, perfect for summer swims and picnics.
